thread.title: Tripura CM Manik Saha to Inaugurate Tourism Promo Fest on December 3 | Agartala News - Times of India
thread.title_full: Tripura CM Manik Saha to Inaugurate Tourism Promo Fest on December 3 | Agartala News - Times of India

author: PTI
title: Tripura CM Manik Saha to Inaugurate Tourism Promo Fest on December 3 | Agartala News - Times of India
text: Agartala: Tripura CM Manik Saha is slated to inaugurate Tripura Tourism Promo Fest in Gomati district on Dec 3, a senior minister said Saturday.To be organised in four popular destinations till Dec 14, the festival aims to increase tourist footfall in the state by 39% to 50% and Various events will be organised at Neermahal Water Palace in Sepahijala on Dec 9, while several other programmes will be held at Jampui Hill in North Tripura on Dec 11, he said.The main programme will be held at Vivekananda Ground in Agartala from December 12 to 14.ptiWe also published the following articles recentlyStage set for 100th edition of Tansen Fest;CM to inaugurate the event on Dec 15Gwalior is gearing up to host a grander-than-ever Tansen Festival, celebrating the legendary musician. The event, starting December 15th, will feature over 150 Indian and 10 international artists. Tabla maestro Pandit Swapan Chaudhuri will receive the prestigious Tansen Award. Beyond performances, attendees can enjoy exhibitions of rare instruments, city tours, and cultural excursions.115540006Glass bridge in Kanyakumari to open in DecTamil Nadu Public Works Minister E.V. Velu has announced that the bowstring arch glass bridge connecting Vivekananda Rock Memorial and the Thiruvalluvar Statue in Kanyakumari will be open to the public by December.115539754Taluk-level adalats in state in Dec-JanThe Kerala cabinet has decided to hold taluk-level adalats, public grievance redressal meetings, in December 2024 and January 2025. These meetings, led by ministers and officials, will address a wide range of issues, including land disputes, certificate delays, social welfare programs, environmental concerns, agricultural matters, and disaster relief.115538497
